trigger.title: Deck processing engine - parse PPTX and extract content
trigger.body:
## Context
Task MC #60 from Build Product backlog.

## Description
Implement the deck processing engine to parse uploaded PPTX files and extract content (slides, text, images, layout) for use in the SlideHeroes workflow.

## Requirements
- Parse PPTX files uploaded via the deck upload feature
- Extract slide content (text, images, shapes)
- Support template extraction for consistent styling
- Output structured data for use in Outline → Storyboard workflow

Label: plan-me
